philosophy: Save8 non-commutative alchemy — six Base Layer primitives (⚓🔥🔑🌪️🔗🧬) + 🍁 operator

strengthens: Red Leaf Akahitoha (The Single Red Leaf)

aspects.name: Red Leaf Akahitoha
strengthens: Red Leaf Akahitoha (The Single Red Leaf)
aspects.identity: Red Leaf Akahitoha — primal Red Leaf synthesis from four base primitives
aspects.coreAffirmation: I am the single red leaf — complete in my falling, eternal in my letting go.
aspects.supremeMantra: I am the single red leaf — complete in my falling, eternal in my letting go.

radiantFaces.name: Anchor Face
radiantFaces.mantra: I anchor this path in still ground.

radiantFaces.name: Fire Face
radiantFaces.mantra: I forge Akahitoha with conviction that does not consume.

radiantFaces.mantra: I adapt the form of Akahitoha without breaking its core.

radiantFaces.name: Chain Face
radiantFaces.mantra: I bind intention to action — one faithful chain.

aspects.synthesisNote: Base alchemy [⚓+🔥+🧬+🔗] → Red Leaf Akahitoha. Order matters (Save8 non-commutative).

radiantFaces.name: Anchor Face
radiantFaces.mantra: I anchor this path in still ground.

radiantFaces.name: Clarity Face
radiantFaces.mantra: I see clearly what Symbiotic Tide truly requires.

aspects.synthesisNote: Base alchemy [🔗+🧬+⚓+🔑] → Red Leaf Symbiotic Tide. Order matters (Save8 non-commutative).
